events.Name: Summer Fest: 2026
events.description: The ultimate beach festival featuring international DJs, bonfire nights, and sunset sessions at the heart of the coast.

events.Name: Tech Pulse Workshop
events.description: Master the latest web technologies in this intensive hands-on workshop led by industry-leading software engineers.

events.Name: Midnight Jazz Night
events.description: Experience an enchanting evening of soul-stirring jazz performances under the stars in Colombo's iconic garden theater.

events.Name: Startup Pitch Summit
events.description: Where brilliant ideas meet strategic capital. Watch the region's brightest startups compete for funding and mentorship.

events.Name: WebFest Developer Conference
events.description: The biggest gathering of web developers in the country. Keynotes, technical tracks, and networking with global tech leaders.

events.Name: Art & History Museum Tour
events.description: Take a curated journey through time with expert historians and discover the hidden stories behind our national treasures.

events.Name: Marathon City Run
events.description: Join thousands of runners for a refreshing morning sprint along the coastline. Open to all fitness levels.

events.Name: Global Food Carnival
events.description: A gastronomic celebration featuring exotic cuisines from over 30 countries. Live cooking stations and cultural shows.

events.Name: Blockchain & Web3 Meetup
events.description: Dive deep into the future of decentralization. Discuss DeFi, NFTs, and the evolving landscape of Web3 technology.

events.Name: Open Mic Poetry Night
events.description: An intimate space for poets and storytellers to share their voices. Relaxed vibes, coffee, and spoken word magic.

events.Name: Annual Music Awards
events.description: The most prestigious night in the music industry. Celebrating excellence with red carpet appearances and live performances.

events.Name: Photography Workshop
events.description: Capture the essence of the city. Expert photographers guide you through architectural, landscape, and street photography techniques.

reviews.name: johndoe
reviews.description: we had a blast in the 2025 summerfest, hope this one does the same. i'll meet y'all in the event, enjoy the summer!
